name: Find the Duplicate Number
description: Given an array of n + 1 integers where each integer is in [1, n], there is exactly one repeated number. Find it without modifying the array and using O(1) extra space. Hint: treat indices as linked list pointers and use Floyd's cycle detection.
constraints: 1 <= n <= 10^5. nums.length == n + 1. 1 <= nums[i] <= n. There is only one repeated number.
